nasb.text: Like a trampled spring and a polluted well Is a righteous man who gives way before the wicked.

esv.text: Like a muddied spring or a polluted fountain is a righteous man who gives way before the wicked.

cnv.text: 義人在惡人面前屈服， 好像混濁了的水泉、污染了的水井。

ccb.text: 义人向恶人低头， 就像清泉被搅浑， 水井受污染。

csbs.text: 义人在恶人面前动摇， 就如被践踏的泉源，受污染的水泉。
